'''âf-ch-k''' ('''kafachak''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:telemanipulate|telemanipulate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-ch-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:telemanipulate|telemanipulate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-ch-k
|-
! Lemma
| kafachak
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifachak|thifachak]] || [[word:jifachak|jifachak]] || [[word:shifachak|shifachak]] || [[word:kifachak|kifachak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufachak|thuthufachak]] || [[word:jujufachak|jujufachak]] || [[word:shushufachak|shushufachak]] || [[word:kukufachak|kukufachak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufachak|thufachak]] || [[word:jufachak|jufachak]] || [[word:shufachak|shufachak]] || [[word:kufachak|kufachak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufachak|thufachak]] || [[word:jufachak|jufachak]] || [[word:shufachak|shufachak]] || [[word:kufachak|kufachak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefachak|thefachak]] || [[word:jefachak|jefachak]] || [[word:shefachak|shefachak]] || [[word:kefachak|kefachak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofachak|thothofachak]] || [[word:jojofachak|jojofachak]] || [[word:shoshofachak|shoshofachak]] || [[word:kokofachak|kokofachak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofachak|thofachak]] || [[word:jofachak|jofachak]] || [[word:shofachak|shofachak]] || [[word:kofachak|kofachak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofachak|thofachak]] || [[word:jofachak|jofachak]] || [[word:shofachak|shofachak]] || [[word:kofachak|kofachak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠfachak|thĂŠfachak]] || [[word:jĂŠfachak|jĂŠfachak]] || [[word:shĂŠfachak|shĂŠfachak]] || [[word:kĂŠfachak|kĂŠfachak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafachak|thathafachak]] || [[word:jajafachak|jajafachak]] || [[word:shashafachak|shashafachak]] || [[word:kakafachak|kakafachak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafachak|thafachak]] || [[word:jafachak|jafachak]] || [[word:shafachak|shafachak]] || [[word:kafachak|kafachak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafachak|thafachak]] || [[word:jafachak|jafachak]] || [[word:shafachak|shafachak]] || [[word:kafachak|kafachak]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafachak|shafachak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafachak|goshafachak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafachak|gokishafachak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafachaknĂŒ|shafachaknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafachaknknĂŒ|goshafachaknknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafachaknĂŒ|gokishafachaknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafachakshĂ«|shafachakshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafachaknkshĂ«|goshafachaknkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafachakshĂ«|gokishafachakshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafachakro|shafachakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafachaknkro|goshafachaknkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafachakro|gokishafachakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafachakmu|shafachakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafachaknkmu|goshafachaknkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafachakmu|gokishafachakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafachaksher|shafachaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafachaknksher|goshafachaknksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafachaksher|gokishafachaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafachakng|shafachakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafachaknkng|goshafachaknkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafachakng|gokishafachakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafachakya|shafachakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafachaknkya|goshafachaknkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafachakya|gokishafachakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafachakyam|shafachakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafachaknkyam|goshafachaknkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafachakyam|gokishafachakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafachaknĂŒshĂ«|shafachaknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafachaknknĂŒshĂ«|goshafachaknknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafachaknĂŒshĂ«|gokishafachaknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafachaknĂŒro|shafachaknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafachaknknĂŒro|goshafachaknknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafachaknĂŒro|gokishafachaknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafachaknĂŒmu|shafachaknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafachaknknĂŒmu|goshafachaknknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafachaknĂŒmu|gokishafachaknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafachakshĂ«nĂŒ|shafachakshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafachaknkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshafachaknkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafachakshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishafachakshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafachakshĂ«ro|shafachakshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafachaknkshĂ«ro|goshafachaknkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafachakshĂ«ro|gokishafachakshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafachakshĂ«mu|shafachakshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafachaknkshĂ«mu|goshafachaknkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafachakshĂ«mu|gokishafachakshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafachakronĂŒ|shafachakronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafachaknkronĂŒ|goshafachaknkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafachakronĂŒ|gokishafachakronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafachakroshĂ«|shafachakroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafachaknkroshĂ«|goshafachaknkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafachakroshĂ«|gokishafachakroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafachakromu|shafachakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafachaknkromu|goshafachaknkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafachakromu|gokishafachakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafachakmunĂŒ|shafachakmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafachaknkmunĂŒ|goshafachaknkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafachakmunĂŒ|gokishafachakmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafachakmushĂ«|shafachakmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafachaknkmushĂ«|goshafachaknkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafachakmushĂ«|gokishafachakmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafachakmuro|shafachakmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafachaknkmuro|goshafachaknkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafachakmuro|gokishafachakmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
